preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You also notice that the entire interior is currently filled with guards. All seemingly prepared and almost expecting your arrival.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I think I can take them, guys. I think I can take them.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You also see, at the top, Duke Vedmeyer himself. A large, hairless, grey-skinned goliath, wielding a giant two-handed sword, armored with a breastplate.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Wow, that's going to be fun later, but not right now. Okay, do I know? So, let's assess my knowledge real quick. I know about him a little bit. He is one of the thugs that came into the city.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: He is not a magic-wielder, as far as I know.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: As far as you know, no. And at first glance, based on the fact that he is wearing heavy breastplate and is wielding a giant two-handed sword, you get the feeling he is probably not as heavily inclined towards the arcane arts as others you have encountered.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: As I quickly survey the room, do I see anyone else who is a threat greater than a heavily armed guard? Anything that is a creepy wizard or a weird old mage?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Currently, no. Currently, all you see are a series of Whitestone guards in uniform armor, all with heavy crossbows, currently nocked. And as you come blasting through the door, they are already arranged in what appears to be a waiting pattern, should anything try and charge its way into the house.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: So they'll probably all shoot me, won't they?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Wow, that's going to be fun later, but not right now. Okay, do I know? So, let's assess my knowledge real quick. I know about him a little bit. He is one of the thugs that came into the city.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: He is not a magic-wielder, as far as I know.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: As far as you know, no. And at first glance, based on the fact that he is wearing heavy breastplate and is wielding a giant two-handed sword, you get the feeling he is probably not as heavily inclined towards the arcane arts as others you have encountered.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: As I quickly survey the room, do I see anyone else who is a threat greater than a heavily armed guard? Anything that is a creepy wizard or a weird old mage?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Currently, no. Currently, all you see are a series of Whitestone guards in uniform armor, all with heavy crossbows, currently nocked. And as you come blasting through the door, they are already arranged in what appears to be a waiting pattern, should anything try and charge its way into the house.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: So they'll probably all shoot me, won't they?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: So directly in front of me, there's a staircase going up?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: There are doors on each side that are currently locked, and other than that, no.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: They are closed currently, and they appear to be-- There's a giant wooden beam crossed over the front of each. Then there's the outside which leads to the exterior, to the raining outside of the household, and the stairs that go up.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: So 61. So you take half that, which would be 31 points of piercing damage on you in one volley of crossbow bolts at you. (shoosh) You protected Trinket, and the rage did descend it a little bit. The pain, as all these bolts are now sticking out of your chest. You look like this front-quilled porcupine. You just take the pain and grin for a second. You have that iron-y taste of blood reach the back of your throat from the immediate impact and it just further intensifies your rage. I'm going to have everyone here roll initiative because you're all acting simultaneously at this point.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: All right. Grog, you push your way in, Trinket following behind you right there. Immediately, you see the upper banister, right over the railing also, similar to what Scanlan encountered, has guards completely within this area, at the ready, crossbows pulled. In wait.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Oh, god. He just keeps adding them!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: There is Tylieri. All waiting, crossbows at the ready. The doors slam open, you guys rush in. For a second, there's nothing immediately within your range, and you look up and see an entire array of guards all trained upon you and Trinket. A voice behind them goes, "Loose!" (fshh)

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: You're going to tell us when we can do something in the back, right?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yep. This is just-- because of the speed everything goes, he gets there before anybody.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: No worries. All right, that is-- ooh. That is 27 to hit?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: That is 15 to hit? No. Third one, that is 16 to hit? Nope. That is a 21 to hit?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: All the shitty guards were over at the other house.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Six crossbow bolts come at you. That's eight points of piercing damage. Don't halve them yet. We'll add them all up and then we'll halve that.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: So, eight plus 13. 21. Plus eight again, 29. Plus another nine.
